locations.name: 基伍湖
locations.summary: 基伍湖（盧安達語：Ikiyaga cya Kivu；林格拉語：Etímá Kivu）位於東非大裂谷西支，為剛果民主共和國與盧安達的界湖。由断层陷落而成，海拔1460米。南北长96千米，东西宽48.3千米，面积2700平方千米，为非洲第八大…

relations.subject: Albertine owlet
relations.evidence: There has also been a sight record from Kahuzi-Biéga National Park, west of Lake Kivu in the Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC). The Albertine owlet occurs in very open montane forest and its ecotone where there are many clearings and a dense undergrowth

relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: Albertine owlet
relations.evidence: Deforestation and forest degradation are the most likely threats within the range of the Albertine owlet
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

relations.subject: Albertine owlet
relations.evidence: The forest in the Itombwe Mountains and Kahuzi-Biéga National Park is under increasing pressure from agricultural clearance and grazing, timber cutting, mining and hunting
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。
